text: T-018 has been flagged for elevated acetylene in its latest dissolved-gas sample. Pull the on-file DGA record, run the analyzer, and identify the most likely fault mode together with the recommended next maintenance step.
characteristic_form: The answer should report the stored DGA gas concentrations for T-018, name the analyzer's fault code or label consistent with an arc-discharge pattern, and give the recommended maintenance action that follows from that finding.
